1. The Obsidian vault at: /Users/eva.doelle/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-CANCOMGmbH/Eve

3. Common project locations like ~/Desktop, ~/Documents, ~/Downloads, ~/Projects, ~/Workspace

- Any folder named "shop wizard", "shopwizard", "shop-wizard" or similar

Report every matching file path you find. Search thoroughly.
